slots.example: At Contoso, we empower businesses to foster collaborative thinking to further drive workplace innovation. By closing the loop on investment management and using the latest technology, we help businesses grow and expand their portfolio funds.
Businesses need new investment opportunities but are using old or outdated tools and services
25% increase of investment inquiries prove that there's consumer interest for simpler portfolio management
Investing in the stock market increased business portfolios by $20 million in 2019
Loss of potential income by not offering investment opportunities for businesses
Customers want something that’s easy to adopt and simple to use
Our product makes investing and portfolio management easier, and no other product on the market offers the same benefits
Reduce costs for client by helping businesses increase their profits in the stock market
A simple product that gives businesses the information they need in order to make informed financial decisions
Only product specifically dedicated to investment tools for business
First beautifully designed product that's both stylish and functional
Conducted testing with businesses in the area
Designed with the help and input of investment experts in the field
Designed to make investing simple, supported, and worth it.
Free 90-day investment help for new customers
We based our research on market trends and stock market historical performance data
We believe people need new investment tools to help businesses grow their funds
Minimalist design and easy to use
Opportunity to build · fully inclusive market
Where we sit versus the competition
Contoso checks every box the competition leaves open.
How we’ll scale in the future
Roll out product to local businesses to help establish the product
Release the product to the general public and monitor stock market trends
Gather feedback from the financial community to expand availability of the product
Revenue scales ~38× to $216M by Year 3, turning profitable as growth outpaces costs.
Total funding raised across four sources
Capital secured across four sources to fund the next 18 months of operations.

At Contoso, we believe in giving 110%. By closing the loop on investment management and using the latest technology, we help businesses grow and expand their portfolio funds. We thrive because of our market knowledge and a great team behind our product. As our CEO says, "Efficiencies will come from proactively transforming how we do business."
